title: Samsung wrong model delivered — ordered WW10N641RBX/TL, delivered WW70K54E0YW/TL
notes: Wrong-model-delivered case. Replacement Policy §1.3 makes this eligible for direct replacement with the originally ordered model regardless of the return window. The serial label on the delivered unit (WW70K54E0YW/TL) does not match the invoice's product code (WW10N641RBX/TL).
